title: Axos SSoT Update Proposal Payload
description: Generated when the daily web sync detects a discrepancy between the live Axos website and the internal sSoT.json. Halts for Ed25519 HITL signature.

ssot_json_key_path.description: The exact dot-notation path in sSoT.json (e.g., products.consumer_deposit.summit_savings.apy)

justification.description: Brief explanation or exact text snippet scraped from the website.
